Hero.description: Understand your rights, analyze disputes, and resolve legal conflicts faster with AI-powered legal guidance.

Features.title: Empowering your legal journey
Features.description: We bridge the gap between people and justice with streamlined case management and direct expert access.

scheduling.title: Smart Case Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Centralized legal case management with automated scheduling and deadline tracking for maximum efficiency.

secure.title: Secure Video Consults
secure.desc: End-to-end encrypted consultations with verified legal professionals from the comfort of your home.

ai.title: Practice Intelligence
ai.desc: AI-powered insights and legal document automation to handle repetitive drafting and discovery tasks instantly.

HowItWorks.title: Transparent & efficient resolution
HowItWorks.description: Our three-step process simplifies complex legal procedures through intelligent automation.

submit.title: Submit Dispute
submit.desc: Share your case details and documents securely for initial AI analysis.

analyze.title: AI Legal Analysis
analyze.desc: Our specialized AI identifies relevant laws and legal precedents for your specific case.

resolve.title: Direct Lawyer Access
resolve.desc: Connect with verified legal experts who are specialists in your dispute type.

Analyzer.title: AI Dispute Analyzer
Analyzer.description: Upload a dispute description, and our AI identifies legal issues, suggests legal actions, and even generates drafted documents instantly.

Categories.title: Dispute Categories
Categories.subtitle: Coverage for every legal struggle in your life.

list.name: Rahul Sharma
list.text: Successfully resolved my rental deposit dispute within 15 days using Justifi AI notice generation.

list.name: Priya Varma
list.text: The video consultation was seamless. The lawyer was highly professional and saved me from a bad contract.

list.name: S. K. Gupta
list.text: Truly futuristic. My consumer case was stuck for 2 years. AI analyzer gave me the right path immediately.

Footer.cta: Consult trusted experts online using a simple credit-based system.
Footer.brandDesc: Online session scheduling made simple, secure, and accessible for everyone.
Footer.refundPolicyText: Refund Policy: If we approve your refund, we will process and credit it to your bank account within 3-5 days.
Footer.disclaimer: Justifi is a technology platform and does not provide legal consultation, advice, or representation. All services are provided independently by professionals using the platform.
